basic_details.job_title: Sangli Urban Co-operative Bank Divisional Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Sangli Urban Co-operative Bank Divisional Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.sangliurban.bank.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Sangli Urban Co-operative Bank Divisional Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 50 years Considering the experience of the candidate, relaxation in age will be given.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate / Post Graduate from a recognized University. Preference will be given to C.A., JAIIB, CAIIB Passed candidate.
qualification.details: Graduate / Post Graduate from a recognized University. Preference will be given to C.A., JAIIB, CAIIB Passed candidates.

salary_details.pay_scale: Negotiable – depends upon the qualification experience etc.
salary_details.details: Salary is negotiable and depends upon the qualification and experience of the candidate.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sangli Urban Co-operative Bank Divisional Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sangliurban.bank.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Sangli Urban Co-operative Bank Divisional Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.sangliurban.bank.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sangli Urban Co-operative Bank Divisional Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sangli Urban Co-operative Bank Divisional Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Divisional Officer post is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Divisional Officer post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 45 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years for the Divisional Officer position. Age relaxation may be considered based on experience.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Divisional Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Graduates or Post Graduates from a recognized university. Preference will be given to those who have passed C.A., JAIIB, or CAIIB examinations.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Sangli Urban Co-operative Bank Divisional Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Divisional Officer position?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Divisional Officer post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Divisional Officer post is negotiable and will depend on the candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Divisional Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Divisional Officer in Sangli Urban Co-operative Bank.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the Sangli Urban Co-operative Bank's official website, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. Does the bank offer any age relaxation for experienced candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, the bank may offer age relaxation to candidates considering their experience in the relevant field.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Divisional Officer position is Full Time.
